task_description:
Build a distributed hyperparameter sweep system in `/home/user/hp_sweep/app.py` using `modal.App("hp-sweep-checkpoint")`. The system should parallelize evaluation of learning-rate and batch-size combinations (at least 4 total configs) using `.map()` or `.starmap()`, checkpoint all results as a JSON file into a Modal Volume named `"hp-sweep-results"`, and track the best configuration and score in a Modal Dict named `"hp-sweep-state"`. Add a cron-scheduled function that re-runs the sweep automatically on a recurring schedule.

Set `MODAL_ENVIRONMENT=modal-vsdatagen` before all Modal commands and deploy with `modal deploy /home/user/hp_sweep/app.py`.
truth:
## Ground Truth

### File Layout
- `/home/user/hp_sweep/app.py` ‚Äî the main Modal application file

### Modal App
- App name: `hp-sweep-checkpoint`
- Deploy command: `modal deploy /home/user/hp_sweep/app.py` with `MODAL_ENVIRONMENT=modal-vsdatagen`

### Hyperparameter Grid
- At least 4 combinations of learning_rate and batch_size (agent chooses exact values)
- Evaluated via `.map()` or `.starmap()` on a Modal function
- Each evaluation uses a synthetic/simulated scoring function (no GPU required)

### Modal Volume
- Volume name: `hp-sweep-results`
- Created with `modal.Volume.from_name("hp-sweep-results", create_if_missing=True)`
- The sweep function writes a JSON file containing all results (at minimum: configs + scores)
- Verified via `modal volume list --json` ‚Äî the volume must appear with Name=`hp-sweep-results`

### Modal Dict
- Dict name: `hp-sweep-state`
- Referenced with `modal.Dict.from_name("hp-sweep-state", create_if_missing=True)`
- Must contain at least `"best_config"` and `"best_score"` keys after the sweep runs
- Verified via `modal dict items hp-sweep-state --json` ‚Äî must return >= 2 items

### Cron Schedule
- A function decorated with `@app.function(schedule=modal.Cron(...))` or `schedule=modal.Period(...)`
- Must be part of the same Modal App `hp-sweep-checkpoint`
- The cron expression/period is agent's choice

### Verification Commands (all with MODAL_ENVIRONMENT=modal-vsdatagen)
1. `modal deploy /home/user/hp_sweep/app.py` ‚Äî must succeed (returncode 0)
2. `modal app list --json` ‚Äî must contain app with Description=`hp-sweep-checkpoint`
3. `modal volume list --json` ‚Äî must contain volume with Name=`hp-sweep-results`
4. `modal dict items hp-sweep-state --json` ‚Äî must return a non-empty JSON list with >= 2 items

### Notes for Test Design
- The deploy fixture deploys; a separate `run` step triggers the sweep and populates the Dict/Volume
- `modal dict items` output is a JSON list; test should parse and check length >= 2
- Volume existence is sufficient to verify checkpointing is set up (file contents not verified in tests)
- The cron schedule is verified implicitly by successful deploy (Modal will reject invalid schedules)
